# Biiig Hug

## Description

Upon pickup, remove 4 cards from your Deck. Whenever you shuffle your Draw Pile, add a Soot into your Draw Pile.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

<!-- Reserved for the meta-agent. Append lessons, combos, and heuristics here.
     Wiki facts live above the divider. -->
- Powerful starter-card cleanup, but the recurring Soot penalty hurts longer fights and reshuffle-heavy draw decks; compare against immediate combat relics before taking.
